note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Sacral region wound site, rates 4/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Pressure Ulcer pressure ulcer Sacral region measures 3.4 cm x 2.1 cm x 1.7 cm.
  Wound bed: 43% slough, 57% granulation tissue. Periwound: macerated.
  Drainage: heavy. Odor: none.
Assessment: Pressure Ulcer pressure ulcer Sacral region — not improving.
Plan: Continue current dressing regimen. Foam dressing change daily.
